prompt: Photorealistic close-up of a wooden key rack mounted on a wall. Many hooks. On most hooks hangs a single ordinary key. But one identical key which is distincly noticeable — same shape, same bright finish (like a popular person) — hangs on every single hook, duplicated across the entire rack, always present alongside each unique key.  Remember - One identical key appears on every hook alongside unique keys. Each unique key shares its hook with the popular key — but not with each other. Your friends' friend count always exceeds yours. Shallow depth of field, warm ambient light, no text, no numbers, no labels, no words, no writing of any kind in the image.
visual_logic: Bright, identical keys appears on every hook alongside unique keys, occuring seperately as well. Because the popular kids appear in everyone's list, they pull average friends count of your friends group upwards.
